text:
Of course I couldn't. A long time ago I heard about one who stole a fox.

They lived in the woods.

One day the fox saw the man coming.

"Give me your clothes!

I'll wear them.

Perhaps someone will listen."

So he took off his clothes,

And wrapped them around the man.

And he wore them.

Until they were black. That's why he liked them.

People knew him.

They saw him. 

That's why they didn't believe him.

They didn't think he could.

So he walked through the forest. 

But all the crows knew him.

All the crows knew his voice.

And they jeered.

So he threw a piece of chicken feathers.

And some felt bad.

So they gave him some.

And he went on again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
